label: ECHO
tooltip: Makes trails from moving parts of the image, more echo = longer trails

label: DELAY
tooltip: Create delayed copies of the image that fade away gradually

label: DISTORT
tooltip: Distorts the image with another pattern

label: SPEED
tooltip: Controls how fast distortion pattern moves

label: SIZE
tooltip: Controls the density of the distort pattern

label: MIX
tooltip: Global FX mix, all FX strengths are multiplied by this

label: TIME
tooltip: Increase time between delay's repeated images
